title: The Overlap and Distinction Between People and Computers
description: A Venn diagram illustrating the unique capabilities of humans and computers, and their shared, collaborative potential in the context of AI.
relationships: Humans possess unique traits like empathy, creativity, and ethics. Computers excel at speed, scale, and data processing. Human-Centred AI exists in the overlap, where technology is designed to augment human capabilities, not replace them, leveraging the strengths of both.
